title: みんなで作る特製ドリンク♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one of my days off, I spot Mejiro Ardan with a
heap of shopping bags by her feet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think a short break is in order. Perhaps
I've purchased too much...
choice_data_list: That stuff looks heavy. Need a hand?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, could I trouble you? I would really
appreciate it. In fact, I've almost reached my
limit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! You've been a great help.
Oh, there you are! ♪ Arrrdaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, and you're with a trainer? Hiya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we happened to cross paths a little earlier.
I must have looked quite tired, considering how
quickly they offered to help carry my bags.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Many thanks for assisting Ardan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Um... May I offer you a drink as a token of my
gratitude? I'm just about to make some.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! We're having a party where we all bring
ingredients for healthy drinks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Did you bring that whole pile of
ingredients, Ardan?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: D-did I bring too much?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You could feed an army with all this! Why did you
bring so much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... I found so many things that I imagined
the two of you would like, and I couldn't help
myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've always been quick to get sick, so I do have
some knowledge when it comes to nutrition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I've never had the opportunity to actually
help my friends with this knowledge, so I wanted
to be of use...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You have borne a great burden for us. I rejoice at
your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You're not especially fond of liver, are you,
Chiyono O? I've brought some cocoa powder and
mustard spinach for your iron intake.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow! You remembered that I don't like liver?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I have Greek yogurt for you, Yaeno! ♪ It's
low in fat and high in protein, perfect for your
muscles and bones.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: How is it that you know of my desire to train both my muscles and bones?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I know more about you than you could
ever know.
choice_data_list: That just goes to show how much you love them.
That just goes to show how much you love them.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... I know more about you than you could
ever know.
choice_data_list: That just goes to show how much you love them.
That just goes to show how much you love them.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.
I see that you keep a close eye on your rivals.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: L-l-l-love, you say?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Gosh, you're making us all blush.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've got the perfect idea! Yaeno! How's about we
think up a mixture for Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That is an excellent idea. Do you have any
particular preferences, Ardan?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
What kind of drinks do you like? Lemony ones?
Creamy? Maybe something like a sports drink?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh my, so many to choose from. Hehe! ♪ Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the trio have fun making drinks for each
other.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Love, eh? Ehehe, we feel the same way too!
Right, Yaeno? ♪

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, indeed! Both of us...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: W-we love you, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, b-but not in a romantic way, of course!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Gwahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Y-Yaeno?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki runs away in embarrassment, and
we find ourselves racing around looking for her...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Rivals... Yes, you're quite right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
S-so you've already figured out what our weak
points are?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Perhaps I have. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I-I see... So you know our strengths and
weaknesses because we're rivals... If I were to sum
this up with a proverb, then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Keep your friends close, and your rivals at a
party"! Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... I see?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Chiyono O's puzzling proverb, Mejiro
Ardan tilts her head in confusion. It looks like
everyone's made their feelings for each other
known.
